topic: coffee dissolution time vs temperature
image_prompt: SVG: scatter graph of time for diffusion to be complete vs temperature. X-axis 'Temperature / °C' 0 to 120 (major ticks every 20, minor every 5); Y-axis 'Time for diffusion to be complete / s' 0 to 700 (major ticks every 100, minor every 25). Three plotted data points (5,655),(25,554),(100,175) with teal cross (×) markers, and a single straight best-fit line drawn only across the data domain from (5,655) to (100,175) so the value read at 40°C is about 480 s.
